basementwaterproofingsiouxfallssd.comsiouxfallssdbasementwaterproofing.com
Action Plan
  1. 1/10
  1. Search Google for 'Basement waterproofing Sioux Falls SD' — verify competition
  2. Check domain availability: basementwaterproofingsiouxfallssd.com
  3. If green light: build site + get ranking
  4. **Homepage** — Hero + trust signals + service overview + CTA + FAQ
  5. **Services** — Detailed service page with pricing context
  6. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
  7. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
  8. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Sioux Falls SD
  9. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords
  10. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
  11. **Hero Section** — H1: "Basement waterproofing in Sioux Falls SD" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Free Consultation / Get Started)
  12. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
  13. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
  14. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
  15. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
  16. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
  17. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
  18. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links
  19. 1 AA compliant

commercialsnowremovalsaltlakecityut.comsaltlakecityutcommercialsnowremoval.com
Action Plan
  1. 6/10
  1. Search Google for 'Commercial snow removal Salt Lake City UT' — verify competition
  2. Check domain availability: commercialsnowremovalsaltlakecityut.com
  3. If green light: build site + get ranking
  4. **Homepage** — Hero + trust signals + service overview + CTA + FAQ
  5. **Services** — Detailed service page with pricing context
  6. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
  7. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
  8. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Salt Lake City UT
  9. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords
  10. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
  11. **Hero Section** — H1: "Commercial snow removal in Salt Lake City UT" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Call Now for Immediate Help / Get a Free Quote)
  12. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
  13. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
  14. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
  15. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
  16. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
  17. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
  18. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links
  19. 1 AA compliant

Action Plan

  7. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours

  9. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords
  10. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
  11. **Hero Section** — H1: "Solar panel installation in Pasadena TX" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Free Estimate / Schedule Consultation)
  12. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
  13. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
  14. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
  15. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
  16. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
  17. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
  18. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links
  19. 1 AA compliant

  11. **Hero Section** — H1: "EV charger installation in Quincy MA" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Free Estimate / Schedule Consultation)
  12. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
  13. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
  14. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
  15. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
  16. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
  17. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
  18. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links
  19. 1 AA compliant
  20. "How much does EV charger installation cost in Quincy MA?"
  21. "How long does EV charger installation take?"
  22. "Do you offer free estimates?"
  23. "Are you licensed and insured?"
  24. "What areas do you serve?"
  25. "Do you offer emergency EV charger installation?"
  26. "What payment options do you accept?"
  27. Complete static website (HTML/CSS/JS)
  28. Responsive design (mobile-first)
  29. Contact form with validation
  30. Google Analytics installed
  31. Search Console submitted
  32. LocalBusiness schema markup
  33. 5 blog article drafts (300-500 words each)
  34. README with deployment instructions

artificialturfmurfreesborotn.commurfreesborotnartificialturf.com
Action Plan
  1. 9/10
  1. Search Google for 'Artificial turf Murfreesboro TN' — verify competition
  2. Check domain availability: artificialturfmurfreesborotn.com
  3. If green light: build site + get ranking
  4. **Homepage** — Hero + trust signals + service overview + CTA + FAQ
  5. **Services** — Detailed service page with pricing context
  6. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
  7. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
  8. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Murfreesboro TN
  9. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords
  10. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
  11. **Hero Section** — H1: "Artificial turf in Murfreesboro TN" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Free Consultation / Get Started)
  12. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
  13. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
  14. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
  15. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
  16. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
  17. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
  18. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links
  19. 1 AA compliant
  20. "How much does Artificial turf cost in Murfreesboro TN?"
  21. "How long does Artificial turf take?"
  22. "Do you offer free estimates?"
  23. "Are you licensed and insured?"
  24. "What areas do you serve?"
  25. "Do you offer emergency Artificial turf?"
  26. "What payment options do you accept?"
  27. Complete static website (HTML/CSS/JS)
  28. Responsive design (mobile-first)
  29. Contact form with validation
  30. Google Analytics installed
  31. Search Console submitted
  32. LocalBusiness schema markup
  33. 5 blog article drafts (300-500 words each)
  34. README with deployment instructions

wheelchairrampgeelongvic.comgeelongvicwheelchairramp.com
Action Plan
  1. 5/10
  1. Search Google for 'Wheelchair ramp Geelong VIC' — verify competition
  2. Check domain availability: wheelchairrampgeelongvic.com
  3. If green light: build site + get ranking
  4. **Homepage** — Hero + trust signals + service overview + CTA + FAQ
  5. **Services** — Detailed service page with pricing context
  6. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
  7. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
  8. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Geelong VIC
  9. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords
  10. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
  11. **Hero Section** — H1: "Wheelchair ramp in Geelong VIC" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Free Consultation / Get Started)
  12. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
  13. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
  14. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
  15. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
  16. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
  17. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
  18. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links
  19. 1 AA compliant
  20. "How much does Wheelchair ramp cost in Geelong VIC?"
  21. "How long does Wheelchair ramp take?"
  22. "Do you offer free estimates?"
  23. "Are you licensed and insured?"
  24. "What areas do you serve?"
  25. "Do you offer emergency Wheelchair ramp?"
  26. "What payment options do you accept?"
  27. Complete static website (HTML/CSS/JS)
  28. Responsive design (mobile-first)
  29. Contact form with validation
  30. Google Analytics installed
  31. Search Console submitted
  32. LocalBusiness schema markup
  33. 5 blog article drafts (300-500 words each)
  34. README with deployment instructions

chimneyrepairberkeleyca.comberkeleycachimneyrepair.com
Action Plan
  1. 5/10
  1. Search Google for 'Chimney repair Berkeley CA' — verify competition
  2. Check domain availability: chimneyrepairberkeleyca.com
  3. If green light: build site + get ranking
  4. **Homepage** — Hero + trust signals + service overview + CTA + FAQ
  5. **Services** — Detailed service page with pricing context
  6. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
  7. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
  8. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Berkeley CA
  9. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords
  10. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
  11. **Hero Section** — H1: "Chimney repair in Berkeley CA" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Call Now for Immediate Help / Get a Free Quote)
  12. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
  13. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
  14. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
  15. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
  16. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
  17. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
  18. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links
  19. 1 AA compliant

  14. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
  15. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
  16. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
  17. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
  18. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links
  19. 1 AA compliant
  20. "How much does Home theater installation cost in Norwalk CT?"
  21. "How long does Home theater installation take?"
  22. "Do you offer free estimates?"
  23. "Are you licensed and insured?"
  24. "What areas do you serve?"
